reason: Canonical live offline/reconnect harness requires an Android device or emulator serial.
command: MC_ALLOW_LIVE=1 MC_TASK_ID=TASK-124 ./tools/agent/mc-agent.sh live offline-reconnect-sync --task TASK-124 --prefix TASK124_OFFLINE_LIVE_
nextAction: Set MC_ANDROID_DEVICE_SERIAL to the physical device or emulator serial, then rerun.
